ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executables" (
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executable file */,
  "base_of_code" INTEGER /* Base address of the code section */,
  "base_of_data" INTEGER /* Base address of the data section */,
  "characteristics" INTEGER /* File characteristics flags */,
  "dll_characteristics" INTEGER /* DLL characteristics flags */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the file */,
  "file_alignment" INTEGER /* File alignment value */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PE32 executable) */,
  "formatted_timestamp" TEXT /* Formatted timestamp of the file's creation */,
  "md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the executable */,
  "sha1" TEXT /* SHA1 checksum of the executable */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "size_of_code" INTEGER /* Size of the code section in bytes */,
  "size_of_headers" INTEGER /* Size of the headers in bytes */,
  "size_of_image" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "time_date_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the file */,
  "machine_architecture" TEXT /* Machine architecture (e.g., x86, x64) */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Operating system type (e.g., Windows, Linux) */,
  "linker_version" TEXT /* Linker version used to compile the executable */,
  "compression_type" TEXT /* Compression type used for the executable (e.g., UPX, PECompact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imported_dlls" (
  "dll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DLL entry */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the executable that imports this DLL */,
  "dll_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported DLL */,
  "dll_version" TEXT /* Version of the DLL */,
  "dll_path" TEXT /* Path to the DLL on the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imported_dlls_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imported_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol entry */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the executable that imports this symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported symbol */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of symbol (e.g., function, variable) */,
  "symbol_address" INTEGER /* Address of the symbol in memory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imported_symbols_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuzzy_hashes" (
  "hash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fuzzy hash entry */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the executable referenced by this fuzzy hash */,
  "fuzzy_hash" TEXT /* Fuzzy hash value */,
  "hash_algorithm" TEXT /* Hash algorithm used to generate the fuzzy hash (e.g., ssdeep, TLSH) */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Block size used for the fuzzy hash calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuzzy_hashes_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metadata */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executable being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for access (e.g., analysis, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the executable being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., malware scan, vulnerability assessment) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the analysis result related to this report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "template_data" TEXT /* Data defining the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)
